description.value:
[2 actions] Archetype, Concentrate, Fire

You sculpt your flames into a persistent wall of fire. Choose a point within 60 feet. A 10-foot burst centered on that point becomes a roaring flame barrier for 1 minute:

  • The area is difficult terrain.
  • Any creature that enters the area or starts its turn within it takes 2d8 fire damage (basic Reflex your class DC).
  • Ranged attacks that pass through the area take a −2 circumstance penalty.

You can dismiss the barrier as a free action.

Suppressed while Sea-Bound.
